strategies.name: Administrative Safeguards
strategies.description: Risk analysis, workforce security, information access management, security awareness and training, contingency planning, evaluation, and business associate contracts.

ML1.summary: Enforce foundational access controls: require MFA for all users, block legacy authentication, configure Conditional Access baselines, restrict guest invitations, and enable audit logging.

ML2.summary: Deploy sensitivity labels for ePHI classification, configure auto-labeling, implement DLP policies for healthcare data, enable access reviews, and deploy information barriers.

ML3.summary: Enable insider risk management, adaptive protection, communication compliance, and advanced data governance for comprehensive ePHI risk coverage.

strategies.name: Physical Safeguards
strategies.description: Facility access controls, workstation use and security, device and media controls including encryption, configuration baselines, and endpoint protection.

ML1.summary: Deploy device compliance baselines, enforce BitLocker encryption, configure Defender Antivirus, enable tamper protection, and restrict device enrollment to corporate devices.

ML2.summary: Deploy exploit protection, network protection, CIS-aligned security baselines, controlled folder access, and mobile app protection policies for comprehensive endpoint hardening.

ML3.summary: Enable all ASR rules in block mode, Credential Guard, Device Guard, firewall policies, removable storage controls, and advanced endpoint threat detection.

strategies.name: Technical Safeguards
strategies.description: Access controls, audit controls, integrity controls, person or entity authentication, and transmission security including encryption and email protection.

ML1.summary: Configure DKIM and DMARC for email authentication, deploy anti-phishing and anti-spam policies, enforce modern authentication, and configure SharePoint sharing restrictions.

ML2.summary: Deploy Safe Links, Safe Attachments, advanced anti-malware, data retention policies, records management, and DLP incident management across all workloads.

ML3.summary: Configure advanced retention with disposition review, restricted access control on sensitive sites, endpoint DLP, and IP-range restrictions for SharePoint.

strategies.name: Breach Notification
strategies.description: Breach detection, notification procedures, incident response capabilities, and security monitoring to support timely breach reporting obligations.

ML1.summary: Enable unified audit logging, configure alert notifications, deploy baseline Teams security settings, and establish audit log retention for breach investigation readiness.

ML2.summary: Enable DLP incident management, comprehensive SharePoint audit events, and insider risk detection to identify potential breaches across all workloads.

ML3.summary: Deploy communication compliance for detecting regulatory violations and insider threats to support proactive breach prevention.
